title: Baidu’s Unlimited OCR processes long documents in one pass
friendlyTitle: Baidu made a smarter tool for reading long documents
summary: Baidu researchers describe Unlimited OCR, an OCR model that can process dozens of document pages in a single inference pass by using a reference sliding-window attention design. The system keeps visual and prompt tokens available while only retaining a short window of generated output tokens.
friendlySummary: Baidu’s new OCR research shows a way for AI to read many pages at once without memory use growing out of control.
whyItMatters: Long-document OCR is a daily bottleneck for legal, finance, government, education, and back-office teams. If this approach holds up in production, document AI could become faster, cheaper, and less dependent on brittle page-by-page pipelines.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This could make it easier to turn PDFs, forms, reports, and scanned files into usable text. That helps people spend less time copying and cleaning documents.
